descriptions.text: Disney's Bonkers: Wax Up! is a 1995 platform video game developed by Al Baker & Associates, published by Sega and released in February 1995 for the Game Gear under the Sega Club brand. It is based on the animated television series Bonkers television series, and was exhibited in the Las Vegas Consumer Electronics Show. It was later ported to the Master System (only in Brazil) in 1998 and ported by Tec Toy.
